title: SCAN
description: Scan the space around you - each pulse of light shows you where you are...
body:
# ABOUT:
My unusual attempt to create an oppressive atmosphere and fear due to the poor visibility of the device. Every 2 seconds, the device's update bar moves from top to bottom, illuminating the surrounding space, which helps you orient yourself at least a little. You can see more details in the GIF.

The ideological heir: **[LiDAR](https://modrinth.com/shader/lidar-s)**

##### _Inspired by the game Scanner Sombr._

### GIF:
![GIF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fceb4efd5cd5fbd6fe7d90b1f76d146c4755f93.gif)

## LINKS:
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/Cz2sCWz5Wh) (Discuss, Bug Reports, Etc.)
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@lolip_p)
- [Telegram](https://t.me/LoLip_p_Community)

## INSTALL THE SHADERS
- Download Client Which Supports Installing Shaders Such As Optifine And Iris
- Download The Shaders
- Copy Shaders to /.minecraft/shaderpacks
- Launch Minecraft, Go To Options --> Video Settings --> Shaders
- Choose **SCAN**
